'''chalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yogourt|yogourt]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yogourt|yogourt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chalaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chælækæth|chælækæth]] || [[word:chælækæj|chælækæj]] || [[word:chælækæsh|chælækæsh]] || [[word:chælækæ|chælækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chalalakath|chalalakath]] || [[word:chalalakaj|chalalakaj]] || [[word:chalalakash|chalalakash]] || [[word:chalalaka|chalalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chalakath|chalakath]] || [[word:chalakaj|chalakaj]] || [[word:chalakash|chalakash]] || [[word:chalaka|chalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chalafkafth|chalafkafth]] || [[word:chalafkafj|chalafkafj]] || [[word:chalafkafsh|chalafkafsh]] || [[word:chalafkaf|chalafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chalakatha|chalakatha]] || [[word:chalakaja|chalakaja]] || [[word:chalakasha|chalakasha]] || [[word:chalakaka|chalakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chalakath|chalakath]] || [[word:chalakaj|chalakaj]] || [[word:chalakash|chalakash]] || [[word:chalaka|chalaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chalakathal|chalakathal]] || [[word:chalakajal|chalakajal]] || [[word:chalakashal|chalakashal]] || [[word:chalakakal|chalakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chalakaathatha|chalakaathatha]] || [[word:chalakaajaja|chalakaajaja]] || [[word:chalakaashasha|chalakaashasha]] || [[word:chalakaaka|chalakaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chalakathan|chalakathan]] || [[word:chalakajan|chalakajan]] || [[word:chalakashan|chalakashan]] || [[word:chalakakan|chalakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chalakathaoro|chalakathaoro]] || [[word:chalakajaoro|chalakajaoro]] || [[word:chalakashaoro|chalakashaoro]] || [[word:chalakakaoro|chalakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|c579b50}}
